{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301163051B6836F312BB2AC35C1"}"},"total":1119},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7460382643018449688","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常不错，类似烂柯奇缘，条理清晰，观之流连忘返。描述了自古以来中国人对修仙的执念，回首凡尘便是仙。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1737011762,"group_id":"7426236463563410456","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8U1XiP8FXp3wp3msH0VMn7V0tNwBtHuSaLKOjjfVLqb","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f0e7b9154dd9402ead5a94014e534721~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787802&x-signature=hEuF2nIHge471UhB9vMtIiccFog%3D","user_id":"4387466379541242","user_name":"清白hshd"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4387466379541242","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7426236463563410456","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越+仙侠+轻松+无敌+装逼】
道一首红尘曲，述一段仙侠梦。
………
苏苜作为一个穿越者，为完善自创的修行体系，便去往红尘中历练。
游历天南海北，见识人仙神魔妖与怪。
一柄断剑，一顶斗笠，一把铜钱，一只老山羊，于湖中斩妖，于天北论道，纵观王朝兴败时代变迁，他所经之处便有他的传说，饮一壶浊酒潇洒自在。
世间无我这般人。
回首往复竟是仙。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4a803473cd1a017d4c271093a1bc5ce9","author":"睡觉了吧","author_id":"","book_id":"7426236463563410456","book_name":"红尘一真仙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#90a0a8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7426246101914616344","read_count":"22577","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1454218"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"716","tags":"东方仙侠,奇幻仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,无敌,东方玄幻,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6e6c41f2d4f9b2493298842c926cf995~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383790&x-signature=D%2F4XX5j0LD4GoVVAnO4qPdFXyNY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2207411483714008","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"47"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301163051B6836F312BB2AC35C1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":24,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":27239,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":44228,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":66429},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7565091562684662552","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"666，新的体系又不超原本的框架。但是结尾确实潦草[偷笑]。波澜壮阔的世界，写的真不错。
不过我觉得还有待改进，一个是背景的描写，我指的是小故事小剧情的故事背景，不够深入人心，可以学习一下（我不是恶魔小说）。
还有一个就是情绪，虽然这部小说已经有足够的起伏，但是只是情节的起伏，不足以带动情绪，我这种看了十多年的读者也只有在结尾的时候有点感觉。
写的真不错"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761387883,"group_id":"7426236463563410456","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"现在十章直接看出作者会不会写，这个作品能不能看。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxJ87D4lMHZrp56ErDK9+0GWWy8Ut4rz9qm33yxN7hkS","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1653256295028877","user_name":"开局得多么毒才会烂尾"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1653256295028877","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7426236463563410456","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越+仙侠+轻松+无敌+装逼】

一柄断剑，一顶斗笠，一把铜钱，一只老山羊，于湖中斩妖，于天北论道，纵观王朝兴败时代变迁，他所经之处便有他的传说，饮一壶浊酒潇洒自在。

ra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301163051B6836F312BB2AC35C1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":46461,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":9196},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7501663561949971225","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到了320张写的很优秀。特别是有一点非常好，就是书中的时间这个概念写得非常好，时间线这个东西不管在哪本书当中都是非常重要的。其他书中表示修炼无岁月山中一甲子，就是纯粹的数字，多少多少年多少多少年。而这本书当中并没有去写时间多少多少年。但是可以感受到时间的流逝。确确实实给了我一种修仙者对时间流逝的淡然，无所谓。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746621317,"group_id":"7426236463563410456","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyCKR3QiVNjFZ+v/boihkkk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"826451203463453","user_name":"延锋城的不戒和尚"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"826451203463453","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1696041346,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d
